instruction:
When the independent variables are correlated with one another in a multiple regression analysis, this condition is called: [ANS] A. multicollinearity  B. elasticity  C. homoscedasticity  D. heteroscedasticity
In multiple regression, the mean of the probability distribution of the error variable $\epsilon$ is assumed to be: [ANS] A. $k$,where $k$ is the number of independent variables included in the model  B. 1.0  C. 0.0  D. Any value greater than 1
